nodes.summary: Apparel — 63 products grouped under the apparel category.

content.text:
# Apparel

Subtree fanout for the apparel category. Walking this subtree returns the category node plus its 63 product children — agents looking for apparel can fetch this scope without scanning the flat catalog index.
